---
name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve the Rayforce-Py
title: "[BUG]"
labels: bug
assignees: protocolstardust

---

## Description
Provide a clear and concise description of the issue.

## Sample Data
Include minimal sample data required to reproduce the problem.

## Version
Specify the version number

## Code Snippet
Provide a minimal, complete code example that reproduces the issue.

## Output
Include the actual output. If applicable, also state the expected output.
